prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: character profile signature art. Primary request: Raze Ember from Ember Heights, flamecore breaker in black cargo pants and red flame jacket, dynamic capoeira-meets-breaking pose, inferno sparks and rooftop cypher crowd at sunset. Style/medium: high-end anime illustration, crisp linework, cinematic lighting, premium game key art. Composition/framing: wide landscape 3:2, character centered with strong silhouette and clear negative space on edges for UI overlays. Lighting/mood: fiery orange-red glow, dramatic rim lights, energetic embers. Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no frame, readable subject at medium size.
